summary: Joel briefly announces the launch of three new Stack Exchange community sites: Gaming, Cooking, and Pro Webmasters. He teases three more launches the following week. The post is essentially a short promotional update with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: Three new Stack Exchange sites launched: Gaming, Cooking, and Pro Webmasters
Stack Exchange was expanding rapidly beyond its programming Q&A origins into diverse topic areas
The pace of expansion was aggressive, with three more sites promised the following week
money_quotes: We launched three new Stack Exchange sites this week!
key_insight: Stack Exchange was aggressively expanding its Q&A platform model into non-technical domains like gaming and cooking.
